title: Cargo boom at Prestwick Airport showing no signs of slowing down

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Cargo boom at Prestwick Airport showing no signs of slowing down. The cargo boom at Prestwick Airport is showing no signs of slowing down following the release of figures from the end of 2025.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Cargo boom at Prestwick Airport showing no signs of slowing down
